distractorPool: If I had studied harder, I would have arrived first.
If I studied harder, I would arrive first.
If I study harder, I will arrive first.
If I would have studied, I arrived first.

prompt.text: Tom hat nicht gelernt und ist im Rennen Letzter geworden. Er redet jetzt darüber. Welcher Satz passt?

answers.text: If I had studied harder, I would have arrived first.

distractors: If I studied harder, I would arrive first.
If I study harder, I will arrive first.
If I would have studied, I arrived first.
items.hintDe: Es ist vorbei: had + 3. Form ... would have + 3. Form.
items.explainDe: Für die abgeschlossene Vergangenheit: If I had studied harder, I would have arrived first.

distractorPool: If she hadn't been ill, she would have come to the party.
If she wasn't ill, she would come to the party.
If she isn't ill, she will come to the party.
If she would have been ill, she had come to the party.

prompt.text: Deine Freundin war gestern krank und ist nicht zur Party gekommen. Du findest das schade. Welcher Satz passt?

answers.text: If she hadn't been ill, she would have come to the party.

distractors: If she wasn't ill, she would come to the party.
If she isn't ill, she will come to the party.
If she would have been ill, she had come to the party.
items.hintDe: Vergangenheit, vorbei: hadn't been ill ... would have come.
items.explainDe: Richtig: If she hadn't been ill, she would have come. Die anderen passen zur Gegenwart/Zukunft.

distractorPool: If it rains tomorrow, we will stay at home.
If it rained tomorrow, we would stay at home.
If it had rained tomorrow, we would have stayed at home.
If it rains tomorrow, we would have stayed at home.

prompt.text: Du sprichst über morgen. Es ist gut möglich, dass es regnet. Welcher Satz passt?

answers.text: If it rains tomorrow, we will stay at home.

distractors: If it rained tomorrow, we would stay at home.
If it had rained tomorrow, we would have stayed at home.
If it rains tomorrow, we would have stayed at home.
items.hintDe: Reale Zukunft: If + Präsens (rains), will + Grundform (stay).
items.explainDe: Für eine wahrscheinliche Zukunft nimmst du Typ 1: If it rains tomorrow, we will stay at home.

prompt.text: If I would have studied, I would have arrived first.

answers.text: If I had studied, I would have arrived first.
had studied

items.hintDe: Im if-Satz steht KEIN 'would have'. Ersetze es durch had: If I had studied ...
items.explainDe: Der häufigste Fehler: 'would have' im if-Satz. Richtig ist had + 3. Form: If I had studied.

prompt.text: If she had asked me, I would helped her.

answers.text: If she had asked me, I would have helped her.
would have helped

items.hintDe: Im Hauptsatz fehlt 'have': would + have + 3. Form (helped).
items.explainDe: Der Hauptsatz braucht 'have': would have helped. 'would helped' ist unvollständig.

prompt.text: If they had invited us, we would come.

answers.text: If they had invited us, we would have come.
would have come

items.hintDe: Vergangenheit: der Hauptsatz braucht would have + 3. Form (come), nicht nur would come.
items.explainDe: 'would come' ist Typ 2 (jetzt). Für die Vergangenheit: would have come.

prompt.text: If Fair Trade would have existed, my dad would have kept the farm.

answers.text: If Fair Trade had existed, my dad would have kept the farm.
had existed

items.hintDe: if-Satz ohne 'would have': If Fair Trade had existed ...
items.explainDe: Im if-Satz steht had + 3. Form (existed), nie 'would have'.

prompt.text: If I had time yesterday, I would have visited you.

answers.text: If I had had time yesterday, I would have visited you.
had had

items.hintDe: Für die Vergangenheit brauchst du had + 3. Form von 'have' = had had: had had time.
items.explainDe: 'had time' allein ist Typ 2. Für die Vergangenheit: had had time.

prompt.text: If they had won the match, they would celebrate.

answers.text: If they had won the match, they would have celebrated.
would have celebrated

items.hintDe: Vergangenheit im Hauptsatz: would have + 3. Form (celebrated).
items.explainDe: 'would celebrate' passt nicht zur Vergangenheit. Richtig: would have celebrated.

prompt.text: If he didn't miss the bus, he would have arrived on time.

answers.text: If he hadn't missed the bus, he would have arrived on time.
hadn't missed
had not missed

items.hintDe: Der if-Satz braucht had not + 3. Form: hadn't missed (nicht 'didn't miss').
items.explainDe: Für die Vergangenheit im if-Satz: had not + 3. Form. 'didn't miss' ist hier falsch.

prompt.text: If you would have asked, I would have helped.

answers.text: If you had asked, I would have helped.
had asked

items.hintDe: Streiche 'would have' im if-Satz und setze had ein: If you had asked ...
items.explainDe: if-Satz = had + 3. Form (asked). 'would have' steht nur im Hauptsatz.

prompt.text: If I ___ (study) harder, I would have arrived first.

answers.text: had studied

items.hintDe: Im if-Satz steht had + die 3. Form. Von 'study' ist das 'studied': had studied.
items.explainDe: Für etwas, das in der Vergangenheit NICHT passiert ist, nimmst du im if-Satz had + die 3. Form: had studied.

prompt.text: If they ___ (arrive) on time, they would have come with us.

answers.text: had arrived

items.hintDe: had + die 3. Form von 'arrive' ist 'arrived': had arrived.
items.explainDe: If + had + 3. Form beschreibt die nicht passierte Vergangenheit: had arrived.

prompt.text: If Vicente had known about Fair Trade, he ___ (join) the project earlier.

answers.text: would have joined
would've joined

items.hintDe: Im Hauptsatz steht would have + die 3. Form. Von 'join' ist das 'joined': would have joined.
items.explainDe: Der Hauptsatz beim dritten Typ ist would have + 3. Form: would have joined.

prompt.text: If the company had paid a fair price, Sofia ___ (leave / not) the farm.

answers.text: wouldn't have left
would not have left

items.hintDe: would + not + have + 3. Form. Von 'leave' ist die 3. Form 'left': wouldn't have left.
items.explainDe: Verneinung im Hauptsatz: would not have + 3. Form (left). 'leave' wird zu 'left'.

prompt.text: If she ___ (miss / not) the bus, she would have arrived on time.

answers.text: hadn't missed
had not missed

items.hintDe: Verneinung im if-Satz: had + not + 3. Form. Von 'miss' ist das 'missed': hadn't missed.
items.explainDe: Der if-Satz mit not heißt had not + 3. Form: hadn't missed.

prompt.text: If we ___ (invite) Tom, he would have come to the party.

answers.text: had invited

items.hintDe: had + 3. Form von 'invite' ist 'invited': had invited.
items.explainDe: If + had + 3. Form (invited) für die nicht passierte Vergangenheit.

prompt.text: If Fair Trade ___ (exist) then, my dad ___ (sell / not) his farm.

answers.text: had existed | wouldn't have sold
had existed | would not have sold

items.hintDe: if-Satz: had existed. Hauptsatz: would not have + 3. Form von 'sell' = sold.
items.explainDe: Beide Teile gehören zusammen: had existed (if) und wouldn't have sold (Hauptsatz).

prompt.text: If she ___ (wash) the car, it ___ (look) clean.

answers.text: had washed | would have looked

items.hintDe: if-Satz: had + 3. Form von 'wash' = washed. Hauptsatz: would have + 3. Form von 'look' = looked.
items.explainDe: had washed (if) + would have looked (Hauptsatz): die saubere Vergangenheit ist nicht passiert.

prompt.text: If you had asked me, I ___ (help) you with your homework.

answers.text: would have helped
would've helped

items.hintDe: Hauptsatz: would have + 3. Form von 'help' = helped: would have helped.
items.explainDe: would have helped = die Hilfe ist nicht passiert, weil du nicht gefragt hast.

prompt.text: She ___ (call) you if she ___ (have) your number.

answers.text: would have called | had had
would've called | had had

items.hintDe: Hauptsatz zuerst: would have called. if-Satz: had + 3. Form von 'have' = had: had had.
items.explainDe: Auch wenn der Hauptsatz vorne steht: would have called ... if ... had had.

prompt.text: If you buy Fair Trade products, you ___ (help) small farmers.

answers.text: will help
'll help

items.hintDe: Reale Zukunft: if + Präsens (buy), dann will + Grundform (help): will help.
items.explainDe: Erster Typ (reale Möglichkeit): If + Präsens, will + Grundform. will help.

prompt.text: If it rains tomorrow, we ___ (stay) at home.

answers.text: will stay
'll stay

items.hintDe: Reale Zukunft: if + Präsens (rains), dann will + Grundform: will stay.
items.explainDe: Erster Typ: If + Präsens, will + Grundform. will stay (wahrscheinliche Zukunft).

prompt.text: If I ___ (be) you, I would join the Fair Trade project.

answers.text: were
was

items.hintDe: Vorgestellt/jetzt unwahrscheinlich: if + Vergangenheit. Bei 'be' nimmst du 'were': If I were you.
items.explainDe: Zweiter Typ (vorgestellt jetzt): If + Past, would + Grundform. Mit 'I' heißt es im Buch 'were'.

prompt.text: If I had more time, I ___ (travel) around the world.

answers.text: would travel
'd travel

items.hintDe: Vorgestellt jetzt: if + Vergangenheit (had), dann would + Grundform: would travel.
items.explainDe: Zweiter Typ: If + Past, would + Grundform. would travel (vorgestellt, jetzt).

prompt.text: Welcher Typ ist es? Ordne jeden Satz dem richtigen Muster zu.

groups.label: if + will
members: If you buy Fair Trade, you will help farmers.
If I have time, I will visit you.

groups.label: if + would
members: If I were rich, I would buy a farm.
If I had more time, I would travel.

groups.label: if + would have
members: If they had invited me, I would have come.
If she had studied, she would have arrived first.

items.hintDe: 'if + will' = reale Zukunft. 'if + would' = jetzt vorgestellt. 'if + would have' = Vergangenheit, vorbei.
items.explainDe: Typ 1 (will) ist eine reale Zukunft, Typ 2 (would) ist jetzt vorgestellt, Typ 3 (would have) ist die abgeschlossene Vergangenheit.

prompt.text: Richtiger if-Satz oder falsch?

items.hintDe: Im if-Satz steht had + 3. Form. 'would have' im if-Satz ist immer falsch.
items.explainDe: Richtig: If I had studied. Falsch: If I would have studied – 'would have' gehört nur in den Hauptsatz.

prompt.text: Zeit von früher (vorbei) oder jetzt vorgestellt? Ordne die Hauptsätze zu.

items.hintDe: Vergangenheit (vorbei): would have + 3. Form. Jetzt vorgestellt: would + Grundform.
items.explainDe: 'would have helped' = die Vergangenheit (vorbei). 'would help' = jetzt vorgestellt (Typ 2).

prompt.text: If we had left earlier, we ___ on time.

answers.text: would have arrived

distractors: would arrive
had arrived
arrived
items.hintDe: Hauptsatz beim dritten Typ: would have + 3. Form (arrived).
items.explainDe: Richtig ist 'would have arrived'. Nicht 'would arrive' (das wäre Typ 2) und nicht 'had arrived'.

prompt.text: If she ___ harder, she would have come first in the race.

answers.text: had studied

distractors: would have studied
studied
has studied

items.explainDe: Der if-Satz braucht had + 3. Form: had studied. 'would have studied' gehört in den Hauptsatz.

answers.text: If I had studied, I would have arrived first.

items.explainDe: Richtig: If I had studied, I would have arrived first. 'would have' gehört nicht in den if-Satz.

distractorPool: If they had invited me, I would have come.

If they would have invited me, I would have come.

answers.text: If they had invited me, I would have come.

If they invited me, I would have come.

items.explainDe: Richtig: If they had invited me, I would have come. 'would came' und 'would have' im if-Satz sind falsch.

prompt.text: If she hadn't missed the train, she ___.

answers.text: wouldn't have been late

distractors: won't be late
wasn't late
wouldn't be late
items.hintDe: Verneinter Hauptsatz: would not have + 3. Form (been): wouldn't have been late.
items.explainDe: Richtig ist 'wouldn't have been late'. 'wouldn't be late' wäre Typ 2 (jetzt), nicht die Vergangenheit.

distractorPool: If it had rained, we would have stayed at home.
If it rains, we will stay at home.
If it rained, we would stay at home.
If it rains, we would have stayed at home.

prompt.text: Es ist zu spät, es ist schon vorbei. Welcher Satz passt?

answers.text: If it had rained, we would have stayed at home.

distractors: If it rains, we will stay at home.
If it rained, we would stay at home.
If it rains, we would have stayed at home.
items.hintDe: Vergangenheit, nicht mehr zu ändern: had + 3. Form ... would have + 3. Form.
items.explainDe: Für die abgeschlossene Vergangenheit: If it had rained, we would have stayed. Die anderen sind Typ 1 oder 2.

prompt.text: If I had known, I ___ you.

answers.text: would have helped

distractors: would help
had helped
help
items.hintDe: Hauptsatz: would have + 3. Form (helped).
items.explainDe: Richtig ist 'would have helped'. Im Hauptsatz steht would have + 3. Form.

distractorPool: If we had had more money, we would have bought it.
If we had more money, we would have bought it.
If we had had more money, we would buy it.
If we have more money, we will buy it.

prompt.text: Welcher Satz beschreibt die Zeit von früher, die nicht passiert ist?

answers.text: If we had had more money, we would have bought it.

distractors: If we had more money, we would have bought it.
If we had had more money, we would buy it.
If we have more money, we will buy it.
items.hintDe: Für die Vergangenheit brauchst du had + 3. Form von 'have' = had had: had had.
items.explainDe: Richtig: If we had had more money ... – 'had had' zeigt die Vergangenheit. Nur 'had' wäre Typ 2.

prompt.text: Welcher Hauptsatz passt zu welchem if-Satz?

pairs.left: If I had woken up earlier,
pairs.right: I wouldn't have arrived late for school.

pairs.left: If she hadn't lost the tickets,
pairs.right: we would have come to the concert.
we would have done well in the exam.

pairs.left: If Tom had listened to the teacher,
pairs.right: he would have understood the lesson.

items.hintDe: Such zu jedem if-Satz den Hauptsatz mit would (not) have + 3. Form, der inhaltlich passt.
items.explainDe: Jeder if-Satz (had + 3. Form) braucht einen passenden Hauptsatz mit would have + 3. Form.

prompt.text: Welcher zweite Teil passt? Achte auf den Typ.

pairs.right: she would have passed the exam.

items.hintDe: Typ 1 = will, Typ 2 = would, Typ 3 = would have. Such den passenden zweiten Teil.
items.explainDe: Jeder Typ hat eine eigene Form: will (Zukunft), would (jetzt vorgestellt), would have (Vergangenheit).

prompt.text: Frag deine Freundin, was sie gemacht hätte, wenn sie mehr Zeit gehabt hätte. Beginne mit: What ...

answers.text: What would you have done if you had had more time?
What would you have done if you'd had more time?

items.hintDe: Frage: What would you have done if you had had ...? – would have + 3. Form (done), if + had had.
items.explainDe: Die Frage zum dritten Typ: What would you have done if you had had more time?

prompt.text: Frag deinen Freund, was er machen würde, wenn er reich wäre. Beginne mit: What ...

answers.text: What would you do if you were rich?
What would you do if you was rich?

items.hintDe: Zweiter Typ als Frage: What would you do if you were rich? – would + Grundform, if + were.
items.explainDe: Die Frage zum zweiten Typ: What would you do if you were rich?

prompt.text: if / I / had / known / , / I / would / have / helped / you

answers.text: If I had known, I would have helped you.

items.hintDe: if-Satz zuerst: If I had known, dann der Hauptsatz: I would have helped you.
items.explainDe: Reihenfolge: If + I + had known, I + would have + helped you.

prompt.text: if / she / had / studied / , / she / would / have / arrived / first

answers.text: If she had studied, she would have arrived first.

items.hintDe: If she had studied, ... she would have arrived first.
items.explainDe: if + had + 3. Form (studied), Hauptsatz would have + 3. Form (arrived).

prompt.text: if / they / hadn't / missed / the / train / , / they / wouldn't / have / been / late

answers.text: If they hadn't missed the train, they wouldn't have been late.

items.hintDe: if-Satz verneint: If they hadn't missed the train, dann wouldn't have been late.
items.explainDe: hadn't missed (if) + wouldn't have been late (Hauptsatz).

prompt.text: if / Vicente / had / joined / earlier / , / he / would / have / saved / money

answers.text: If Vicente had joined earlier, he would have saved money.

items.hintDe: If Vicente had joined earlier, ... he would have saved money.
items.explainDe: if + had joined, Hauptsatz would have saved.

prompt.text: Mach aus diesem Satz den 2. Typ (vorgestellt, jetzt): If I have time, I will help you.

answers.text: If I had time, I would help you.
had time | would help you

items.hintDe: Zweiter Typ: if + Vergangenheit (had), would + Grundform (help).
items.explainDe: Aus Typ 1 (have/will) wird Typ 2 (had/would): If I had time, I would help you.

prompt.text: Bilde einen Satz vom 3. Typ (if + had + 3. Form → would have + 3. Form): 'She missed the train. She arrived late.'

answers.text: If she hadn't missed the train, she wouldn't have arrived late.

items.hintDe: Dreh beide Sätze um: had not missed ... wouldn't have arrived late.
items.explainDe: Aus zwei Tatsachen wird der dritte Typ: hadn't missed (if) + wouldn't have arrived (Hauptsatz).

prompt.text: Bilde einen Satz vom 3. Typ (if + had + 3. Form → would have + 3. Form): 'Die Firma hat keinen fairen Preis gezahlt. Sofias Vater hat die Farm verkauft.'

answers.text: If the company had paid a fair price, Sofia's dad wouldn't have sold the farm.

items.hintDe: had paid (if) + wouldn't have sold (Hauptsatz).
items.explainDe: Beide Tatsachen werden umgedreht: had paid ... wouldn't have sold.

prompt.text: Bilde einen Satz vom 3. Typ (if + had + 3. Form → would have + 3. Form): 'We didn't invite Tom. He didn't come.'

answers.text: If we had invited Tom, he would have come.

items.hintDe: had invited (if) + would have come (Hauptsatz).
items.explainDe: Aus den zwei Tatsachen wird: If we had invited Tom, he would have come.

prompt.text: Mach aus diesem Satz den 3. Typ (die Zeit von früher, schon vorbei): If I were rich, I would buy a farm.

answers.text: If I had been rich, I would have bought a farm.
had been rich | would have bought a farm

items.hintDe: Dritter Typ: if + had + 3. Form (been), would have + 3. Form (bought).
items.explainDe: Aus Typ 2 (were/would) wird Typ 3 (had been/would have): If I had been rich, I would have bought a farm.

prompt.text: Du hast nicht um Hilfe gefragt und bist durchgefallen. Drücke dein Bedauern als Satz vom 3. Typ aus.

answers.text: If I had asked for help, I wouldn't have failed.
If I had asked for help, I would not have failed.

items.hintDe: if-Satz: had asked. Hauptsatz verneint: wouldn't have + 3. Form von 'fail' = failed.
items.explainDe: had asked (if) + wouldn't have failed (Hauptsatz) zeigt das Bedauern über die Vergangenheit.

prompt.text: Wenn ich das gewusst hätte, hätte ich dir geholfen.

answers.text: If I had known that, I would have helped you.
If I had known, I would have helped you.
If I'd known that, I would've helped you.
I would have helped you if I had known that.

items.hintDe: if + had + 3. Form (known), would have + 3. Form (helped).
items.explainDe: Vergangenheit, nicht mehr zu ändern: If I had known, I would have helped you.

prompt.text: Wenn sie früher losgefahren wären, wären sie pünktlich angekommen.

answers.text: If they had left earlier, they would have arrived on time.
If they had set off earlier, they would have arrived on time.
They would have arrived on time if they had left earlier.

items.hintDe: if + had left, Hauptsatz would have arrived.
items.explainDe: If they had left earlier, they would have arrived on time.

prompt.text: Wenn es morgen regnet, bleiben wir zu Hause.

answers.text: If it rains tomorrow, we will stay at home.
If it rains tomorrow, we'll stay at home.
We will stay at home if it rains tomorrow.

items.hintDe: Reale Zukunft: If + Präsens (rains), will + Grundform (stay).
items.explainDe: Erster Typ: If it rains tomorrow, we will stay at home.

prompt.text: Wenn ich reich wäre, würde ich um die Welt reisen.

answers.text: If I were rich, I would travel around the world.
If I was rich, I would travel around the world.
I would travel around the world if I were rich.

items.hintDe: Zweiter Typ: If + Past (were), would + Grundform (travel).
items.explainDe: Vorgestellt, jetzt: If I were rich, I would travel around the world.
